author: mmusich
body:
backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50638

#### PR description:

From the original PR:

>  TItle says it all, adds monitoring of the impact parameters for the shortened tracks workflow, both in offline DQM and in the standalone tracker alignment monitoring tool.

#### PR validation:

Run successfully:

```
runTheMatrix.py --what upgrade -l 18450.0 -t 4 -j 8 --nEvents 500 --ibeos -i all
```

and found in the output DQM file the appropriate set of new histograms.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Intermediate backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50638 for the 2026 data-taking release.
title: [16.1.X] add impact parameters monitoring to the `ShortenedTrackResolution` and  `ShortenedTrackValidation`
